state.next-action:
Phase 34 shipped on 2026-04-11 from .planning/plans/phase-34/PLAN.md.
=== SHIPPED === - Windows standalone executable built at dist/release/gad-v1.32.0-windows-x64.exe - Global Windows install flow landed; gad.exe is installed at %LOCALAPPDATA%\Programs\gad\bin - GitHub-first install docs landed with skills.sh separated from CLI installation - Release-surface gating and GitHub Actions POSIX release workflow landed
=== NEXT === 1. Plan and execute phase 35 runtime identity + telemetry attribution work 2. Thread Claude Code and Codex runtime identity through raw logs and TRACE.json 3. Revisit signing/notarization only after the executable distribution path is stable
